form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 431m (25.13) beating Jacobite Battle in Grade 5 on April 4. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 431m (25.13) beating Jacobite Battle in Grade 5 on April 4. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room rounding the turn into the back straight.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Maitland (22.47) in a NG, finishing a 6 length fourth. Has two successes and five minors from nine starts from box 2. Can feature with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 431m in 25.11 last start, beating Bentley Fisher. Looks the one to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 431m in 25.11 last start, beating Bentley Fisher. Looks the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 431m at this track in a handy (25.13), beating Lovely Bubbly. Will find this a bit tougher, will not find this easy. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 431m at this track in a handy (25.13), beating Lovely Bubbly. Will find this a bit tougher, will not find this easy. Not keen.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (25.18) at this track over 431m. Has a superb 24.8 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked out across heels rounding the turn into the back straight.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 10 lengths behind Mully The Master over 431m. Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Scootin' Scooby at this track last start over 431m (25.38). Has to be respected.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.5 lengths at this track over 340m (19.64) beating Nicmac Star in Grade 5 on April 1. Holds top-three claims.

Checked off heels rounding the turn into the back straight.

form.formComment: Last start finished third on March 25 over 340m at this track behind Urban Boy, beaten 4.5 lengths (20.09) in a Grade 5. Others favoured this time.
